project.name: badgr_harness
project.description: Local LLM orchestration harness with RAG corpus, MCP server integration, and Pro Hunter job search subsystem.

system_overview.what_it_is: badgr_harness is the central AI orchestration platform for BADGRTechnologies LLC. It provides deterministic local LLM routing, strict JSON validation, retry/fallback/supervisor escalation, a 2087-doc RAG knowledge base, and hosts the MCP integration layer for Claude Code sessions.

subsystems.harness_core: orchestrator.py + router.py + validator.py — classify tasks, route to appropriate model, validate output, retry/fallback/escalate
subsystems.rag: ChromaDB at rag_db/ — two collections: badgr_corpus (2087 docs, AI/tech reference) and job_opportunities (pro_hunter feed)
subsystems.mcp: .mcp.json registers pro-hunter MCP stdio server — exposes job tools to Claude Code
subsystems.pro_hunter: Satellite system at /home/t0n34781/projects/pro_hunter — scrapes/scores jobs, feeds RAG, exposes MCP tools

environment.hardware: AMD Ryzen 5 5500, 16GB RAM, AMD RX 6500 XT
environment.chromadb_note: System python3 has pydantic version conflict with chromadb. Use pro_hunter venv for any chromadb operations: /home/t0n34781/projects/pro_hunter/.venv/bin/python

ollama_models.qwen2.5:14b: 9.0GB — DO NOT use in pipeline (OOM risk on 16GB)

badgr_corpus.purpose: AI/tech reference knowledge base — papers, guides, validated repos

metadata_schema.total_chunks: integer total chunks for this source

badgr_corpus.status: READ-ONLY from harness perspective — ingested by corpus_harvest scripts, do not modify

job_opportunities.doc_count: grows with pipeline runs (1 as of 2026-04-26)
job_opportunities.purpose: Scored job postings from pro_hunter pipeline
job_opportunities.fed_by: pro_hunter/rag_bridge.py — called automatically after each pipeline run

tools: job_search — scrape and score a URL against a skill profile
job_query — semantic search over job_opportunities RAG collection
job_apply — trigger form filling for a job (dry_run=true by default)
list_jobs — list CSV jobs filtered by min_score
ingest_jobs_to_rag — bulk push all CSV jobs to RAG

mcp_integration.how_to_use: Open Claude Code in /home/t0n34781/projects/badgr_harness. MCP server auto-registers. Use tool names directly in conversation.

harness_core.flow: task input → router.py (keyword classify) → model selection from models.yaml → worker call → validator.py (strict JSON) → retry once → fallback model → supervisor escalate if still failing → output + log

key_files.orchestrator.py: Main orchestration loop — dispatch, retry, fallback, escalation
key_files.validator.py: Strict JSON schema validation — strips markdown fences, extracts JSON, validates fields
key_files.models.yaml: Model registry — roles, timeouts, fallback chains
key_files.schemas/: Pydantic response models for each task class

logs_and_reports.logs/: JSONL event logs — one file per day

phase_status.pro_hunter_integration: complete — MCP registered, RAG bridge live

worker_delegation_map.claude: Architecture, integration design, final verification, complex reasoning
worker_delegation_map.mistral:7b: Parse, score, summarize, document generation — PRIMARY worker

known_issues.description: System python3/python3.12 has pydantic version conflict with chromadb. chromadb imports fail outside pro_hunter venv.
known_issues.resolution: Always use /home/t0n34781/projects/pro_hunter/.venv/bin/python for any chromadb/RAG operations.

known_issues.description: badgr_corpus metadata lacks skill/topic labels. 2087 docs have only source/chunk/ext. No category tagging.
known_issues.resolution: Run rag_label.py (planned) to enrich metadata with topic/skill tags via local model batch processing.

known_issues.description: Ollama request queue pollution: killed Python processes leave orphaned in-flight requests.
known_issues.resolution: Force-unload via keep_alive:0. Restart ollama service if stuck (requires sudo).

recommended_next_steps: Run pro_hunter daily collection to populate job_opportunities RAG
Test MCP tools from Claude Code session in badgr_harness directory
Build rag_label.py to add skill/topic metadata to badgr_corpus
Wire skill-to-corpus mapping so harness can RAG-augment job scoring
Set up cron for both harness health checks and pro_hunter daily runs

quick_reference.check_rag_collections: /home/t0n34781/projects/pro_hunter/.venv/bin/python -c "import chromadb; c=chromadb.PersistentClient(path='rag_db'); [print(col.name, col.count()) for col in c.list_collections()]"
